thread.title: Top 10 Producers in your cellar?
thread.notes: Full-thread parse from a logged-in-browser fetch (wb_browser_fetch). Covers 620 posts, 2013-02 through 2024-03; the later ~2024-2026 tail of the thread was not in the fetched stream, so 2023-2026 era counts (and momentum) are undercounted for that window. Re-grab and re-parse to extend.
